title: BEL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 56 Field Operation Engineer, Project Engineer Posts
organization: Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL), Homeland Security and Smart City Business SBU (HLS&SCB), Bengaluru Complex
department: Homeland Security and Smart City Business SBU (HLS&SCB), Bharat Electronics Limited
short_info: BEL is recruiting 56 Field Operation Engineer and Project Engineer-I posts on contractual basis with BE/B.Tech/ME/M.Tech/MCA qualification, last date 08 June 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be intimated via registered e-mail ID after shortlisting

application_fee.details: Application fee must be paid through SBI Collect (online mode only) before submitting the application. Candidates applying for more than one post must make separate payments for each post. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Candidates must note the SBI Collect Reference Number generated after payment and enter it in the application form. | SBI Collect Payment Link: https://www.onlinesbi.sbi/sbicollect/icollecthome.htm?corpID=14842 - Select PSU → Bharat Electronics Ltd → Payment Category: "Field Operation Engineer for HLS SCB" or "Project Engineer-I for HLS SCB" as applicable.

age_limit.details: The upper age limit indicated is for candidates belonging to General (UR) and EWS categories, as on 01-06-2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India guidelines for reserved categories.

qualification.education_qualification: ME/M.Tech/BE/B.Tech/B.Sc Engineering (4-year course) or MCA from AICTE/UGC approved college/institute or recognized university. Pass class for all categories including SC/ST/PwBD.
qualification.experience: 5 years relevant post-qualification work experience in Networking/Data Centres operations/Database administration. Required knowledge: Data networking concepts, DBMS, Firewall, AAA server, Routing protocols (OSPF, BGP), Switching protocols (STP, RSTP, VTP), EtherChannel, NTP, VLAN, Port Security, DNS, CCNA basics, IP addressing & subnetting, Linux basics.
qualification.details: Only Indian Nationals are eligible. Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on 01-06-2026. Candidates should be willing to be posted at project sites in Delhi, Punjab, Uttar Pradesh and Madhya Pradesh and willing to travel across India.

selection_process: Written Test 85 marks (85%) Conducted for all shortlisted candidates meeting eligibility criteria.

Interview 15 marks (15%) Only candidates passing the written test are shortlisted for interview in ratio 1:10 (merit and category-wise). Interview scheduled on same day or subsequent days immediately after written test results.
Selection shall be through a Pre-Registered Walk-In Selection to be held in and around Delhi
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only through the Microsoft Office Form link / QR code provided on the BEL official website. Registrations received in any other format will not be considered. Candidates must first pay the application fee via SBI Collect, note the reference number, and then complete the online form. Applications that are incomplete, not legible, contain false or suppressed information, or do not meet the eligibility criteria will be summarily rejected.
Steps to Fill the Online Application:
Go through the detailed advertisement and confirm all eligibility criteria are met before proceeding.
Pay the application fee through SBI Collect at the link provided; note the SBI Collect Reference Number.
important_instructions: THIS IS A TEMPORARY/CONTRACTUAL ENGAGEMENT, NOT REGULAR EMPLOYMENT IN BEL. Candidates engaged will not be treated as regular employees of BEL and will not be entitled to employee benefits. BEL has no obligation to offer regular employment during or after the contract period. Candidates must be willing to be posted at project sites in Delhi, Punjab, Uttar Pradesh and Madhya Pradesh and must be willing to travel across India based on project requirements. Candidates can apply for more than one post, but must submit separate applications and separate fee payments for each post. Online registration is mandatory before the closing date of 08-06-2026; candidates who have not registered will not be allowed to appear for Walk-In selections. Lateral application for the same post within BEL is not permitted and will be summarily rejected. Merely fulfilling the minimum eligibility criteria does not vest any right on candidates to be called for the Written Test or Interview. BEL reserves the right to debar/disqualify any candidate at any stage for any reason. BEL reserves the right to cancel, restrict, enlarge, modify or alter the recruitment/selection process at any stage without issuing further notice or assigning reasons. No changes to date/time/venue of the written test or interview will be entertained once a candidate is shortlisted/selected. There will be no separate communication to candidates regarding non-selection at any stage. Only Indian Nationals need apply. Canvassing in any form will result in disqualification. BEL does not demand or charge any fee other than the application fee stated in this advertisement. Candidates are urged not to be misled by fraudsters claiming to represent BEL. BEL will take legal action including criminal action against fraudsters. All revisions/corrigendum, if any, will be hosted on BEL's official website only - candidates should visit regularly.
